messages.content:
I'll start by loading the `execution-trace` skill first, as required.

Now loading the `report-analyzer` skill.





Now I'll analyze the blood report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell framework and generate the 8 structured JSON records.

Based on the PDF at `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/0a37ceac-89de-4b51-8207-f09e7dfdefa6/Blood%20Report.pdf`, applying the BloomCell 4-step analysis framework, here are the 8 structured records. I'll now build all merged records and store them one by one in Cosmos DB.



Storing **Record 1 of 8** — Internal Notes (highlight):✅ Record 1 saved. Now storing **Record 2 of 8** — Internal Notes (note):✅ Record 2 saved. Now storing **Record 3 of 8** — Understanding Your Results (highlight):✅ Record 3 saved. Now storing **Record 4 of 8** — Understanding Your Results (note):✅ Record 4 saved. Now storing **Record 5 of 8** — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (highlight):✅ Record 5 saved. Now storing **Record 6 of 8** — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (note):✅ Record 6 saved. Now storing **Record 7 of 8** — Long-Term Strategy (highlight):✅ Record 7 saved. Now storing **Record 8 of 8** — Long-Term Strategy (note):8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to **Step 6** — updating the original PatientDocument:

Document updated successfully.
